info.title: FNF: Switch Funkin'
info.author: Slushi
info.description: Real FNF' for Nintendo Switch, why not?
info.details:
Enjoy the Psych Engine 1.0.4 experience on your Nintendo Switch!

You must always open the game from an official game (usually by holding the R button while launching a game from the HOME menu).

Installing mods:

Installing mods on Switch Funkin' is easy. Once you open the game at least once, on your SD card, inside the "switch" folder, you will see a new folder called "Switch-Funkin" Inside it, you will find the “mods” folder, which works exactly the same as normal Psych Engine.

changelog:
v1.1.0
Fixes:
- FIxed a bug when the engine crashes  on reset a song (https://github.com/Slushi-Github/Switch-Funkin/issues/4, https://github.com/Slushi-Github/Switch-Funkin/issues/6, https://github.com/Slushi-Github/Switch-Funkin/issues/7, https://github.com/Slushi-Github/Switch-Funkin/issues/8, https://github.com/Slushi-Github/Switch-Funkin/issues/10, https://github.com/Slushi-Github/Switch-Funkin/issues/11, https://github.com/Slushi-Github/Switch-Funkin/issues/12)
- Fixed a bug with dialogues on the week 6 (https://github.com/Slushi-Github/Switch-Funkin/issues/5)

Additions:
- Songs should now load faster since some issues with the LoadingState have been fixed and all of the console's CPU threads are being used to preload content.

A HUGE apology to everyone who had to wait so long for these issues to be fixed, especially the bug related to restarting a song :3

FIxes:
- The way to check if the current version is really old has been corrected (I forgot to upload the changes to GitHub).
- Fixed an issue that prevented mods from being disabled.
